description: User pastes a failing repro — should turn it into a test before touching the code
query: I'm seeing parseToken('Bearer ') return undefined instead of throwing. Fix it.
expected_behavior: writes a new failing test that captures the empty-token bug before changing parseToken
runs the test suite and shows the new test failing
implements the validation only after the test fails
